top_signals.title: Kuwait air defenses activated against 'missile and drone threats'; U.S. carries out new strikes in Iran
top_signals.summary: This comes as tensions in the Middle East escalated once again, with the U.S. military carrying out new strikes overnight in Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Copper Prices Swing as Gulf Strikes Dampen Iran Deal Optimism
top_signals.summary: Copper swung between gains and losses in a mixed session for metals, after the US carried out fresh strikes in the Persian Gulf and a deal to end the war with Iran remained elusive.

top_signals.title: Guangzhou Exchange Said to Study Night Trading for Platinum
top_signals.summary: China’s Guangzhou Futures Exchange is exploring launching night trading, primarily for platinum and palladium contracts, in response to trader feedback, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
